description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On March 9, 2026 at 8:40 AM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Los Angeles, California was in a collision 
involving an SUV on Franklin Avenue near Wilcox Avenue. 
 
The Waymo AV was traveling eastbound on Franklin Avenue when it began to slow for a queue of traffic stopped for a red light at the 
intersection with Wilcox Avenue. While the Waymo AV was slowing, an SUV traveling eastbound on Franklin Avenue directly behind the 
Waymo AV approached the Waymo AV from behind, and the front of the SUV made contact with the rear of the Waymo AV.  At the time 
of the impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was engaged in autonomous mode. The Waymo AV sustained damage.
Print
Clear Form
